name: awesome-design-md
description: Bundle the VoltAgent awesome-design-md catalogue as a local agent skill plugin, with an English skill and helper workflow for fetching real DESIGN.md files into projects.

interface.shortDescription: Select, fetch, and apply brand-inspired DESIGN.md templates for frontend work.
interface.longDescription: Bundle the awesome-design-md catalogue as a local skill, keep the upstream brand index on disk, and help the agent fetch the real DESIGN.md file for a chosen brand before implementing UI changes.
defaultPrompt: Pick a suitable DESIGN.md from awesome-design-md for this product, fetch it, and restyle the landing page accordingly.
Use the Vercel DESIGN.md direction from awesome-design-md to redesign the homepage.
Choose a strong developer-tool aesthetic from awesome-design-md and turn it into concrete frontend implementation rules.
